name: @argismonitor/opencode-plugin
description: ArgisMonitor (formerly OmniRoute) OpenCode plugin. Drives dynamic model discovery, /connect auth flow, and multi-instance AI router providers via the official @opencode-ai/plugin contract.

scripts.test: node --import tsx/esm --test tests/scaffold.test.ts tests/auth.test.ts tests/options-schema.test.ts tests/multi-instance.test.ts tests/fetch-interceptor.test.ts tests/provider.test.ts tests/gemini-sanitize.test.ts tests/combos.test.ts tests/config-shim.test.ts tests/features.test.ts tests/usable-combo.test.ts tests/disk-snapshot-perms.test.ts tests/fork-features.test.ts tests/auto-combo-context.test.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm test
